title: AI in code — by the numbers (demo sample #3)
story: Square data explainer on the state of AI among developers, from two real published surveys. Calm, informative, jewel-toned. Beats: 84% of developers now use AI -> GitHub passed 180M+ developers, ~1 new every second -> 1.13M+ repos ship an LLM inside -> but only 29% trust what it writes -> 'Adoption is here. Trust is the next build.' Every number real + cited on a persistent source footer (Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2025, GitHub Octoverse 2025). Counters count up; bars/rings grow. Informative, not hype.

source.query: Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2025 GitHub Octoverse 2025 AI developer adoption trust statistics
